---
title: "Final Submitted Thesis (2009)"
---

::: {.archive-notice}
**The final submitted thesis** is available as a PDF download (4.7 MB, 322 pages). A post-viva revised Word document (January 2011, 307 pages) also exists in the archive.
:::

## Download

The PDF of the final submitted thesis will be made available here once it has been copied from the archive.

**Title:** *Work and its Other: A Multiple-perspective Analysis of Incapacity Benefit Reform*

**Author:** Jon Minton

**Date:** September 2009

**Pages:** 322

---

::: {.callout-note}
## About the two versions
The author prefers the [pre-revision draft (2008)](pre-ch1.qmd), which presents the theoretical framework in its most expansive form before it was condensed through the viva revision process. Both versions are presented for completeness.
:::
